name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities
notes: Edit this BB to include categories that are considered the be part of events seen after typical compromises.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed, Anomaly: Potential Honeypot Access, Botnet: Potential Botnet Connection (DNS), WormDetection: Local Mass Mailing Host Detected, BB:ReconDetected: Basic Recon Rules
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Post Compromise Activities on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication User or Group Added or Changed, Anomaly: Potential Honeypot Access, Botnet: Potential Botnet Connection (DNS), WormDetection: Local Mass Mailing Host Detected, BB:ReconDetected: Basic Recon Rules
